description:
Build a Patient Triage System for an urgent care clinic. The wiki has 3 pre-loaded patient intake forms (tagged 'IntakeForm') with vitals and history.

Create a 'Triage Dashboard' tiddler (tagged 'Dashboard') with a registration form. The form should have inputs for patient-name, age, chief-complaint, temperature, heart-rate, blood-pressure, bound to '$:/temp/NewPatient'. A 'Register Patient' button creates a tiddler titled from patient-name, tagged 'Patient' and 'WaitingRoom', with all form fields and triage-status set to 'Awaiting Triage', then clears the temp tiddler.

Create a '$:/custom/TriageAssessment' tiddler (tagged '$:/tags/ViewTemplate', for Patient-tagged tiddlers) that displays a vitals table and chief complaint. Include five triage buttons — '1 - Resuscitation', '2 - Emergent', '3 - Urgent', '4 - Less Urgent', '5 - Non-Urgent' — each setting triage-level and triage-status to 'Triaged'. Include a 'Move to Treatment' button that replaces the 'WaitingRoom' tag with 'Treatment'.

Create a 'Waiting Room Board' tiddler (tagged 'Dashboard') with two dynamic sections — 'Awaiting Triage' listing WaitingRoom patients with triage-status 'Awaiting Triage', and 'Triaged' listing WaitingRoom patients with triage-status 'Triaged' sorted by triage-level ascending.

Using the system, register all 3 patients from their intake forms via the dashboard. Assign Maria Santos to Level 2, James Wilson to Level 4, Aisha Patel to Level 1. Move Aisha Patel to Treatment.
